chosen_action.title: Deliver materially refreshed primary-repo-flat publisher contact packet for immediate manual execution

why_this_action.summary: The current Codeberg-first publisher packet materially changed again on 2026-05-25 with fresh email-backed publisher targets, so re-delivering it to the current chat is truthful follow-through rather than duplicate packet churn.
verification: marketing_2026-05-25_primary_repo_flat_contact_manual_delivery_refresh.json delivered the earlier 2026-05-25 packet state centered on ctxt.dev / Signum, NxCode, and TIMEWELL.

drafts/primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet_latest.md was regenerated at 2026-05-25T10:15:00 with a new lead set centered on TIMEWELL and Codivox after fresh primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json findings surfaced Toolradar, TLDL, and Codivox.
marketing_execution_board_latest.md is stale relative to that 10:11 discovery refresh, so this delivery also closes the truth gap before the shared board is regenerated.

marketing_2026-05-25_primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet_execution.json and marketing_2026-05-25_101911_primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_follow_through.json mark the refreshed packet as prepared/follow-through, not yet delivered in this new state.

expected_outcome: Immediate manual execution of at least one fresh publisher-contact request using the updated Codeberg-first packet, followed by attributable repo inspection or citation movement.

measurement_window.success_metric: At least one TIMEWELL or Codivox contact attempt is sent from the refreshed packet, followed by any attributable qualified repo inspection or Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If still unsent by the review checkpoint, replace this lane instead of refreshing the same packet again.
